title: thymus longicaulis var. antalyanus
intro: Thymus longicaulis var. antalyanus, also known as Turkish thyme, is a subspecies of the thymus longicaulis plant, a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it effective against various infections and skin conditions. The health benefits of Thymus longicaulis var. antalyanus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Thymus longicaulis var. antalyanus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or essential oil, and is often used in traditional medicine and herbal remedies.
